ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "time_reported" TEXT /* Time the incident was reported */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "time_occurred" TEXT /* Time the incident occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the incident */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporter who submitted the incident */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a follow-up is needed */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow-up is needed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_disposition FOREIGN KEY ("disposition") REFERENCES dispositions ("disposition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building/location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "campus_area" TEXT /* Area of the campus where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime (e.g., SIMPLE ASSAULT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the crime */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "disposition_name" TEXT /* Name of the disposition (e.g., REPORTED TO OTHER AGENCY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disposition */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a follow-up is required for this disposition */,
  "resolution_time_frame" TEXT /* Expected time frame for resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reporter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reporter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reporter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reporter (e.g., student, faculty, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the reporter belongs to */,
  "campus_role" TEXT /* Specific role within the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated incident */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporter submitting the report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the report regarding the incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reporter_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the reporter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are reported */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the statistics are reported */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of reported cases for that year */,
  "campus_area" TEXT /* Area of the campus where the crime occurred */,
  "resolution_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases resolved within the time frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action taken */,
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated incident */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency that took action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "date_actioned" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Description of any follow-up action required */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_actions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_actions_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES law_enforcement_agencies ("agency_id")
)
